programme.title: Are You Here
programme.desc: In this touching dramedy, weatherman Steve (Owen Wilson) must join his off-the-grid best friend Ben (Zach Galifianakis) for Ben's estranged father's funeral.

programme.title: Limitless
programme.desc: Facing unemployment and his girlfriend's rejection, writer Eddie Morra is sure that he has no future. That all changes when an old friend gives him a drug that produces enhanced mental acuity. Stoked on the untested chemical, Eddie rises to the top of the financial world and attracts the attention of a tycoon (Robert De Niro) who intends to use him to make a fortune. But terrible side-effects and a dwindling supply threaten to collapse Eddie's house of cards.

programme.title: Edison
programme.desc: Ambitious young reporter Pollack (Justin Timberlake) suspects insidious corruption in his town's elite police unit, known as F.R.A.T., and finds a friendly source in Deed (LL Cool J), a dissatisfied member of the squad. With Deed's information and the backing of his publisher, Ashford (Morgan Freeman), and a crusading lawyer, Wallace (Kevin Spacey), Pollack infiltrates the secretive police cabal. He finds himself in over his head, however, when he discovers the true extent of the criminality.

programme.title: Danger Zone
programme.desc: Rick Morgan (Billy Zane), an American engineer who runs a mine in East Africa, is approached one day by his friend Jim Scott (Robert Downey Jr.), who needs someplace to store canisters of toxic waste. Unfortunately, a spill occurs a short time later, resulting in deaths and Morgan having to leave the country. A year later, he is approached by a government agent (Ron Silver) looking for a missing supply of potentially hazardous poison, which in truth hides something even more valuable.

programme.desc: A group of virtual hunters unleash a deadly shark in a Texas lake, causing a young couple to fight for their lives during a peaceful fishing trip in a secluded cove.

programme.title: A Witness to Murder
programme.desc: Sanitation worker MaryBeth is in the wrong place at the wrong time when the mayor's wife is murdered. She refuses to talk to the sheriff she dislikes, but the killers know she was there. Now they're coming for her to make sure she stays silent.

programme.title: Space Ranger
programme.desc: The Space Ranger program, set up to protect humans from intergalactic threats in the future, is opened back up when a new threat arrives on Earth, threatening to destroy humanity once and for all.

programme.title: Lone Star Shark 2
programme.desc: A new victim has been chosen to face off against a ravenous shark in a Texas lake.

programme.title: Pinkerton

programme.desc: A police officer investigates the mysterious death of a suspect who was in his custody during a routine transfer.

programme.title: Kung Fu League
programme.desc: When Fei Ying's manager stops him from getting the girl he loves, he magically summons help from kung fu legends.

programme.title: Call of Heroes
programme.desc: The soldiers from a village seek vengeance after a warlord kills innocent people while they are away.

programme.title: Spiritwalker
programme.desc: Unable to remember anything about his life, a man begins regaining consciousness in a new body every 12 hours. Now, he must piece together his identity, all while evading attacks from pursuing agents and dangerous criminals alike.

programme.title: Sakra
programme.desc: Accused of murder, a martial artist goes on the run in search of answers about his own mysterious origins and the unknown enemies out to destroy him.

programme.title: Romantic Friction
programme.desc: Artist Lea pretends to be the author of a hit romance novel written by Michael, leading to love.

programme.title: Best Friend From Heaven
programme.desc: When her dog is killed, Tara cancels her wedding. But her dog's ghost and her small town have a surprise.

programme.title: The Single's Guidebook
programme.desc: A content creator making a series about singlehood meets her match in polar-opposite, Jackson.

programme.title: The Soulmate Search
programme.desc: Lindsay and Will bond after agreeing the dating service that matched them has made a mistake.

programme.title: Nash
programme.desc: The life of NBA All Star Steve Nash as he tries to navigate his way through the toils of professional sports.

programme.title: Gun
programme.desc: Rich is the police's prime target against the war on gun runners. When an exchange goes bad, paranoia ensues, causing rifts among Rich and his team.

programme.title: Animal
programme.desc: When dangerous street thug James "Animal" Allen (Ving Rhames) is sent to prison, he continues his violent ways working for fellow inmate Kassada (Chazz Palminteri). This changes after Animal encounters Berwell (Jim Brown), a revolutionary who introduces him to the writings of Malcolm X. Animal reforms, realizing that murder and crime are destroying his community. After Animal is released, he goes home to find his son, Darius (Terrence Dashon Howard), involved in gang activity just like he was.

programme.title: The Recall
programme.desc: When five friends vacation at a remote lake house they expect nothing less than a good time, unaware that planet Earth is under an alien invasion and mass-abduction.

programme.title: Animal 2
programme.desc: James "Animal" Allen (Ving Rhames) took the fall for the crimes of his older son (Vicellous Shannon) and is now serving a life term at Folsom Prison. When his younger son, James Jr. (K.C. Collins), is framed for murder, Allen refuses to let two men from the same family submit to life imprisonment for crimes they didn't commit. When he learns that James Jr. was set up by someone at the prison, he resolves to win his son's freedom. To do this, he must return to his violent brawler roots.

programme.title: The Contract
programme.desc: Frank Carden (Morgan Freeman), one of the world's greatest assassins, is handed a lucrative contract to kill a highly secretive billionaire. But in a twist of fate, Carden is involved in a car accident during the job, and when his gun is found after he is admitted to a hospital, federal marshals arrest him. Meanwhile, ex-cop Ray Keene (John Cusack) is hiking with his son, Chris (Jamie Anderson), when Carden's cohorts try to spring him from custody, and soon the pair is caught in the crossfire.

programme.title: Her Best Revenge
programme.desc: After a tragic death, five fraternity bother reunite at a vacation home, while the shadow of a death from their past lingers over them. A mysterious figure begins to send them threatening messages. Their secrets and loyalties are put to the test and they must uncover the truth about what happened that night five years ago.

programme.title: How Did We Get Here
programme.desc: Four struggling couples attend a wellness retreat led by Dr. Sellers. Melonie and Derrick struggle with issues of infidelity, Omar and Sonya struggle with commitment, Chastity and Monae have differing opinions on parenthood, and Stephanie and Delvin are struggling with their intimacy. As the couples dive into their treatment, they must confront their own demons to move forward. Will they make it out together? Or go their separate ways?

programme.title: Shuttered Secrets
programme.desc: When Trey’s ex-girlfriend, Jada, unexpectedly shows up to his studio, she accuses him of dark secrets and being involved in a missing persons case. Their reunion quickly spirals into psychological warfare and violence. As the night goes on, the line between predator and victim blurs when other mysterious figures arrive and everything must be questioned.

programme.title: Just Can't Leave You Alone
programme.desc: When a blind date ends in a shootout, Krystal Gray is left with more questions than answers. She discovers a flash drive linked to the murder and a web of secrets involving her brother, a dirty cop, and a mysterious man named Jarrell. As she uncovers the truth, Krystal becomes the target in a deadly game where love and betrayal blur and everyone has a hidden agenda.

programme.title: Love Unexpected
programme.desc: Chase is a young and confident college student, who is a self-proclaimed “ladies man” but also feels that love is for suckers. That is until he meets his match Kary, the fiercely independent student who isn’t interested in wasting time on anything casual. Chase sees Kary as a challenge and the ultimate prize, but is he willing to give up his playboy ways for true love?

programme.title: Super Cyclone
programme.desc: 300 MPH winds threaten America, so a lone meteorologist must battle the elements to stop the threat.

programme.title: Supercroc
programme.desc: A team of soldiers must stop a giant, bloodthirsty crocodile from reaching a nearby city.

programme.title: Hansel and Gretel
programme.desc: In a modern retelling of the classic horror tale, siblings are enslaved in a gruesome house of horrors.

programme.title: The Land That Time Forgot (2024)
programme.desc: Based on the gripping Science Fiction adventure. Present Day. Survivors of an American military vessel sunk by a Russian sub manage to capture the Russian sub after it surfaces. But now out of fuel, the sub makes its way to a tropical island. As those in the sub explore the island, they realize it is full of previously thought to be extinct creatures like dinosaurs, forcing them to survive the creatures and work together along with those who already live on the island to figure out a way off.

programme.title: Zombie Night
programme.desc: As night falls in a small town, the dead rise. Now the townspeople must fight to survive until sunrise.

programme.title: The Deeper You Dig (Edited Version)
programme.desc: 14-year old Echo and her mother Ivy, a tarot card reader, live a quiet life in a rural area. When reclusive Kurt moves down the road to restore an abandoned farmhouse, an accident leads to Echos murder, and suddenly three lives collide in mysterious and wicked ways. Kurt assumes he can hide his secret under the ground. But Echo burrows into his head until he can feel her in his bones. As she haunts his every move, trying to reach her mother from beyond, Ivy must dig deep to see the signs and prove that love wont stay buried.

programme.title: Night of the Living Dead
programme.desc: Night of the Living Dead opens with chaos - the brains of the recently deceased have become mysteriously reanimated, causing the dead to rise and feed on human flesh. While visiting their father's grave, Barbra (Judith O'Dea) and her brother Johnny (Russell Streiner) are attacked by a strange shuffling man. Barbra runs into a farmhouse where she encounters Ben (Duane Jones), and they must find a way to save themselves from the horde of zombies. George Romero's Night of the Living Dead is hailed as one of the most influential horror films of all time - inspirational, thought provoking, and most importantly, terrifying!

programme.title: November
programme.desc: NOVEMBER is set in a pagan Estonian village where werewolves, the plague, and spirits roam, Rainer Sarnets third feature film is a bold, twisted fairy tale about unrequited love. In NOVEMBER, the villagers main problem is how to survive the cold, dark winter. And, to that aim, nothing is taboo. People steal from each other, from their German manor lords, from spirits, the devil, and from Christ. They are willing to give away their souls to thieving creatures made of wood and metal called kratts, who help their masters, whose soul they purchased, steal even more. A young farmgirl Liina (Rea Lest) is hopelessly in love with Hans (Jrgen Liik), a nearby farmhand, whose heart she loses to the daughter of the German manor lord. In order to regain his love, Liina turns to any means necessary, even if that means tapping into the black magic that is circling around the village. Estonian pagan legends and Christian mythologies come to a spell-binding intersection in NOVEMBER.

programme.title: Ben
programme.desc: A lonely boy befriends Ben, the rat leader of the swarm of rats trained by Willard Stiles from the original film Willard. Ben becomes the boy's best friend, protecting him from bullying and keeping his spirits up in the face of a heart condition. However, things gradually take a downward turn as Ben's swarm becomes violent, resulting in several deaths.

programme.desc: Horror Noire

programme.title: Babadook, The
programme.desc: In this terrifying thriller, a mother must protect her son from an evil, supernatural entity that has escaped the pages of a children's book and is lurking in their home.

programme.title: Prevenge
programme.desc: Prevenge

programme.title: The Wind
programme.desc: The forces of nature tremble with an unseen evil in this chilling western tale of madness, paranoia and supernatural terror howling across the homestead.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: "Jed Gets the Misery" - Jed cheers up Granny by pretending to be sick so she can doctor him. Soon Drysdale and his doctor, Clyburn, are subject to her methods as well.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Jethro brings home a friend, Armstrong Dueser McHugh III, who is coddled by a chauffeur who treats him as frail. The Clampetts know better, and show him a good time, friendship and family.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: When Miss Hathaway gets sick and Mr. Drysdale has to speak at a conference, Jed helps out by running the bank and having Elly be his secretary, while Jethro finds a speech that Drysdale accidentally uses instead of his own. All the while a new teller sucks-up to the men and flirts with the women.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: "The Psychiatrist Gets Clampetted" - Jethro finally gets his bill of health from Dr. Twombly so he can graduate the fifth grade, but Twombly really wants to talk to Grannie again. Drysdale brings him to the Clampetts' just as Grannie showed Pearl how to use a love potion, so everyone thinks Twombly's interest in Grannie is love.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: "The Clampetts Get Psychoanalyzed" - Jethro needs a health certificate to graduate from the fifth grade, so he goes to the only doctor the Clampetts know about - Mrs. Drysdale's psychiatrist. He gets nowhere with Jethro, so Pearl comes and she thinks he is testing her virtue when he tries to lay her on his couch.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: "The Clampetts in Court" - When a couple who ran into the Clampett's car discover that they're rich, they fake injuries and sue the Clampetts.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: "The Clampetts Entertain" - Jed arranges a party to get Grannie out of her doldrums and invites the Drysdale. But when Mr. Drysdale's boss comes and wants to meet them for dinner, he wonders if he's going to be sent to an Alaskan bank when his boss finds out he's been lying about Jed and his family being sophisticated.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: "Duke Becomes a Father" - Mlle. Denise comes back for the birth of her dog's puppies, and to see Jed. They do some "courtin' and sparkin'" Mrs. Drysdale isn't nearly so happy when she finds the puppies share more in common with Duke the bloodhound than Claude the poodle.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: "The Clampetts and the Dodgers" - Jed and Jethro go golfing with Leo Durocher, coach of the Los Angeles Dodgers, who wants to recruit Jethro as a pitcher when he sees how well he can throw.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: "Jed Pays His Income Tax" - When an IRS agent gets chased away by Granny, Mr. Drysdale tells him the story of how the Clampetts came to be rich and move to Beverly Hills.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: "Granny's Spring Tonic" - Miss Hathaway's brilliant-but-frumpy bank protegee Gloria is really a sultry gold-digger with eyes for Jed's $34 million, and Jed's just had his annual dose of Granny's spring tonic.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: "Jed Cuts the Family Tree" - Mrs. Drysdale continues to be forced into doing "practices from the past" by Mrs. Smith-Standish, who discovers that Jed's family is possibly the first to come the country. If so they'd be famous worldwide, but does Jed want that?

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: "The Family Tree" - Mrs. Drysdale wants to get rid of the Clampetts before the arrival of Mrs. Smith-Standish, the head of a 'first family' historical society. But Mrs. Smith-Standish goes to the Clampetts' first and becomes enchanted with their antiques and way of life, even to roping the horrified Mrs. Drysdale into helping do the chores the old-fashioned way.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: "Jed Throws a Wingding" - Flatt and Scruggs and their wives come to visit their old sweetheart, but Pearl thinks they're there to propose. Jed throws a wingding for them and the duo play music for the Clampetts.

With a cast that includes the likes of Gail Patrick and Billy Lee, this adventure saga was based on a novel by the western master, Zane Grey (Riders of the Purple Sage, Fighting Caravans). programme.title: Richard Hammond hosted his first car meet! | Project Jaaaag Ep.9 – FINALE!
programme.desc: After many months of restoration and modification, Project Jaaaag comes to a crescendo! Richard and Mike have invited a bunch of Jaguar enthusiasts down to The Smallest Cog to judge the two DriveTribe Jags – Richard's XJR and Mike's manual XKR. Who will take the crown of the coolest Jag on the channel?!

programme.title: 5 things James May can't live without
programme.desc: He's got his famous jumper on, he's in the bunker, and he's surrounded by his prized possessions. Here are 5 things that are essential to James May's life.

programme.title: Restoring Richard Hammond's Subaru from The Grand Tour | Project Martin Ep.4
programme.desc: After a few weeks of work, Martin the Subaru from The Grand Tour is now back in the game! He has been painted, now has a legal exhaust and some refurbished gold wheels to boot. Although, he coughed up one last hurdle that could have ended in disaster.

programme.title: Turning Richard Hammond's Grand Tour Subaru Impreza into a 500bhp monster! | Project Martin Ep.5
programme.desc: After getting him back road-worthy, Richard Hammond has tasked Mike Fernie with building an engine to take Martin the Subaru's performance to another level. Mike has brought the Grand Tour Impreza to Subaru experts Pole Position UK to turn the car into a monster!

programme.title: Building Richard Hammond's Grand Tour Subaru into a 500hp monster | Project Martin Ep.6
programme.desc: After stripping Martin the Impreza's engine down to bare bones, Mike and the guys from Pole Position set about building the flat-four engine back up, but stronger and more powerful than ever. Aiming for 500hp, Martin gains some upgraded bits that should see him become an absolute weapon.

programme.title: We're putting a V10 into a Mazda MX-5! | Ep.3
programme.desc: A couple of years ago, Mike Fernie set out to make a truly unique MX-5 project car, one powered by a V10 engine. But not just any V10 engine, a tiny, 2.0-litre powertrain from the 1990s. Since then, it has been a turbulent development process to say the least, so Mike has decided to film an update and keep you guys across what is happening.

programme.title: James May has crashed his Tesla! | Everything wrong with his Model S
programme.desc: James May revealed his Tesla Model S years ago on the DriveTribe channel, and he has been using it as a daily ever since. It has taken a bit of a hammering since then, and he admits to having crashed it on more than one occasion. He decided to take Mike Fernie for a tour of the bumps and scrapes, before sending him off to fix them.

programme.title: Fixing James May’s CRASHED Tesla Model S at The Smallest Cog
programme.desc: James May threw Mike Fernie the keys to his daily driver, a Tesla Model S, to be repaired at The Smallest Cog. Andrew Greenhouse and Mike get stuck in to remedy all of the EV's issues, before meeting up with James and reuniting him with the car.

programme.title: First drive of our manual-converted 420bhp Jaguar XKR!
programme.desc: Our manual Jaguar XKR is out on the roads, and Mike Fernie has a burning question about the car – Have we made a better Jag?

programme.title: Richard Hammond Shows Us Around His Office!
programme.desc: Have you ever wondered where Richard Hammond answers his emails? Back at the start of the year, Richard took us for a tour of his rather rudimentary office at The Smallest Cog. Thankfully, as the second series of Richard's TV show has developed, the office has morphed into a much nicer space, including a new DriveTribe studio!

programme.title: James May roasts Jeremy Clarkson & Richard Hammond's cars
programme.desc: James May is back for another roast! And this time he's going after Jeremy Clarkson and Richard Hammond's car collections.

programme.title: Is our 0.6-litre Suzuki Cappuccino faster than a Mk1 MX-5? | TRACK BATTLE Ft. Abbie Eaton
programme.desc: We bought a tiny little kei car – a Suzuki Cappuccino – earlier this year with one goal in mind; making it quicker than the current go-to entry-level sportscar, the Mazda MX-5. Has Mike accomplished his goal? With the help of Abbie Eaton, let's find out!

programme.title: What does the old Stig actually drive? – NEW CAR!
programme.desc: Last year, we revealed that ex-Stig Ben Collins drives a 997 911 Turbo as a daily driver. But in 2023, he has added a car to the Stig garage, and this one is an absolute peach.

programme.title: We’ve bought a cheap (and ridiculously rare) forgotten ’90s performance car!
programme.desc: It's new car time! Mike Fernie and Ben Collins have treated themselves to new motors, and in this video Mike reveals his 1990s performance saloon that most people will have forgotten about.

programme.title: Why Isn’t There A 7-Cylinder Engine?
programme.desc: We have single cylinder engines, twins, triples, four-pots, inline fives, straight-sixes, but then we start to skip some steps. We jump to V8s, V10s and V12s, even V- or W16s. It’s a question many of you probably have never even thought to ask, but now that you’ve clicked on this video, let’s talk about it – why is there no such thing as a 7-cylinder engine?

programme.title: We're putting a V10 into a Mazda MX-5! | Ep.5
programme.desc: We are making two V10 Mazda MX-5s! While we wait for the crazy Connaught 2.0-litre engine to be finished, we are cracking on building a car with an existing V10. And here it is! Let the games begin.

programme.title: We're putting a V10 in a Mazda MX-5! | Ep.6
programme.desc: We're back at it with the Mk1 V10 MX-5, and in this episode we're cutting the Mazda to see just how low we can get the engine. It's time for that S85 to nestle right in there!

programme.title: Richard Hammond drives his 530bhp Grand Tour Subaru for the first time – And it's incredible!
programme.desc: Richard Hammond has been waiting a long time to test out his newly-tuned Subaru Impreza from the Grand Tour. After 2023 was spent building Martin the Subaru into a 530bhp, all-wheel drive, manual monster, Richard is finally thrown the keys to take it for a spin on his favourite Welsh Highland road.

programme.title: £4000 MANUAL XKR Inspected By Jaguar!
programme.desc: After manual-swapping our Japanese imported Jaguar XKR, Mike takes the car back home to Jaguar HQ to have it inspected by the experts at the Jaguar Daimler Heritage Trust. Does it pass the test?

programme.title: Richard Hammond roasts your own cars!
programme.desc: We hosted the first ever DriveTribe event, DriveTribe at Haynes Motor Museum, and Richard Hammond decided to peruse the car park to see what you guys had all turned up in. There was plenty of material for him to roast...

programme.title: Richard Hammond takes his daughter off-roading in his 700hp truck
programme.desc: Richard has been having so much fun in his 700hp pick-up truck that his daughter Izzy has asked to have a go. What's better than some father-daughter quality time in a Ram TRX?!

programme.title: Richard Hammond has saved ANOTHER Grand Tour car!
programme.desc: Richard is really getting into a flow with his TV car collecting, and this little fighter is one of the coolest yet. Welcome a new addition to Hammond’s garage, fresh from The Grand Tour!

programme.title: Should this be Izzy Hammond's new car?
programme.desc: Izzy Hammond needs a new car, and while Richard was away filming, he set Mike Fernie the goal of finding a new potential daily car for her. He may have gone slightly over-budget, but he reckons he's found the perfect car for Izzy's new London life.

programme.title: Old 911 vs new 911: Can an amateur driver beat ex-Stig Ben Collins?
programme.desc: Around a track, of course a brand new 911 992 Turbo S is going to beat a 997 Turbo. But what if you put an amateur driver in the 992, and the Stig in the 997? We pitched GoPro CEO Nick Woodman up against Ben Collins to see if it’s possible to take down the Stig with newer machinery.

programme.title: Richard Hammond Commutes in His 700 BHP TRUCK!

programme.title: Winning Mealtime
programme.desc: Winning Mealtime: Niku Udon; Lemongrass-Caramel Chicken; Stir-Fried Angel Hair Pasta - Chris is in the kitchen to take you through three winning recipes from his rotation: A comforting udon noodle dish with thin slices of beef in a smoky, savory, slightly sweet broth; simple braised/stir-fried chicken that is somewhere between Vietnamese clay pot catfish and Taiwanese Three Cup Chicken; and a go-to quick pasta with tofu and veggies stir-fried in a flavor-packed sauce.

programme.title: Winning Mealtime
programme.desc: Winning Mealtime - Sunday Gravy All Week: We don't need to tell you that kids like spaghetti and meatballs. Who doesn't? And Sunday gravy—with its chunks of fatty meat and sausage bobbing around in red sauce with the meatballs—is even better. Now, the real prize is what else you can do with that gravy. It's not just for lasagna and eggplant parm. Chris Ying shows you his Sunday Gravy recipe, and then how to take that same punchy, meaty, tomato-based umami sauce and use it to make beefy bean and cheese burritos and ratatouille.

programme.title: Recipe Lab with Chris Ying
programme.desc: "Creamy Gochujang Pasta" - Majordomo TV’s Chris Ying unlocks the mystery of the TikTok trend of creamy gochujang pasta and wonders if it’s actually just a bad substitute for vodka sauce.

programme.title: Recipe Lab with Chris Ying
programme.desc: "Burger Crunch Wrap" - Once again social media compels our man in the Lab to make something he’s never considered making: a bacon cheeseburger crunch wrap.

programme.title: Recipe Lab with Chris Ying
programme.desc: "Redemption Rice" - After an ill-advised dalliance with a terrible chicken korma recipe, Chris tries to redeem the category of mixed-rice dishes, starting with the classic Japanese Takikomi Gohan.

programme.title: Recipe Lab with Chris Ying
programme.desc: "Crispy Gnocchi with Burst Tomatoes" - Chris prepares one of the all-time most popular dishes from New York Times Cooking: Crispy Gnocchi with Burst Tomatoes. Tune in to see if the dish lives up to its poetic name.

programme.title: Recipe Lab with Chris Ying
programme.desc: "Super Hacky Rigatoni Alla Vodka" - After testing out the TikTok trend of gochujang pasta, Chris decides to try the same super-hacky, super-fast approach to pasta with a more classical dish: pasta alla vodka.

programme.title: Recipe Club
programme.desc: "Eggs Jambalaya" - Rachel, Chris, and Bryan tackle a fan-submitted recipe for “eggs jambalaya,” which, spoiler alert, bears little resemblance to authentic jambalaya, but we’re not complaining.

programme.title: Recipe Club
programme.desc: "Spaghetti with Sardines and Cherry Tomatoes" - Rachel Khong joins David Chang and Chris Ying for this episode focused on using tinned fish as the key ingredient. The recipe: Bill Pearis’s Spaghetti with Sardines and Cherry Tomatoes. Dave makes a keto-friendly version. Rachel tries to make it using ingredients from the pantry. Chris makes his vegan.

programme.title: Recipe Club
programme.desc: "Easy Boozy Piña Colada Poke Cake" - This one's a boozy doozy! Chris, Dave, and Bryan tackle Easy Boozy Pina Colada Poke Cake and see if they can make it for under twenty dollars, over two hundred dollars, or with only shelf-stable ingredients in a microwave.

programme.title: Recipe Club
programme.desc: "Grandma Wong's Braised Duck" - Rachel Khong joins Dave and Chris to cook an old family-favorite braised duck recipe three different ways. Dave makes a one-pot version, Chris tries to make it for less than $20, and Rachel goes completely opposite to make a luxe version, spending a minimum of $150.

programme.title: Julia & Jacques Cooking at Home - Roast of Veal and Leg of Lamb
programme.desc: First is a Roast of Veal with Wild Mushrooms, Braised Endive, onions and white wine—the aromas just fill the kitchen. Second is a delicious Leg of Lamb, hip bone removed, studded with garlic on a ragout of white beans and pancetta, onions, mushrooms and thyme. And, not only are you shown how to prepare these dishes, but Jacques then demonstrates, step-by-step, how to carve and serve them.

programme.title: Julia & Jacques Cooking at Home - Potatoes
programme.desc: One Potato, two potato, oh, so many potatoes. Julia and Jacques share their tricks, “trucs” and techniques for perfect baked potatoes, airy mashed potatoes, creamy potato casserole, and delightful lighter-than-air crispy-fried pommes soufflés.

programme.title: Julia & Jacques Cooking at Home - Duck
programme.desc: Duck is a favorite in restaurants, but often considered too difficult to cook at home. No longer! Julia prepares her original (first shown on The French Chef) pan roasted duck, glazed with shallots and parsnips. And Jacques roasts a whole duck, then combines slices of the juicy duck breast with garlic, mustard and delicate salad greens tossed in garlic, mustard and duck giblets.

programme.title: Julia & Jacques Cooking at Home - Salmon
programme.desc: Start with one large, whole Salmon, and observe as Julia and Jacques transform the fish into Salmon tartar and “Instant Gravlax.” This, of course, is prelude to baking the Salmon in an “only Julia can get away with it” bicycle pump inflated parchment papillote (bag).

programme.title: Julia & Jacques Cooking at Home
programme.desc: This meal is the holiday favorite that is so good, Julia & Jacques recommend it for any day of the year. Roast Turkey with sausage and cornbread stuffing, gravy made the old-fashioned way, accompanied by creamed onions and a zesty Cranberry-Apple Chutney. The “not-quite” which has to be seen, is the inventive way the turkey is cut-up before cooking, roasted and re-assembled for serving.

programme.title: Pati's Mexican Table
programme.desc: Pati explores her Jewish roots with historian Mónica Unikel-Fasja, visiting historic sites in Mexico City. At Niddo, she cooks and reminisces with her sister, celebrating family, identity, and stories that shape a life.

programme.title: Pati's Mexican Table
programme.desc: Pati visits Rústico in Cuauhtémoc for pastries with Iván and Germán Ortiz, then explores dreams and creativity at Casa Morgana in Roma with Kiren Miret. Tart, ice cream, and heartfelt stories celebrate passion and tradition.

programme.title: Pati's Mexican Table
programme.desc: Pati travels to Milpa Alta to harvest and char nopales with Chef Jorge Córcega, then joins Luis Alvarado’s family for their storied mole. Over a shared meal, they celebrate how tradition and flavor nourish the community.

programme.title: Pati's Mexican Table
programme.desc: Pati visits Tlatelolco’s Gris with Gabriela Rojas to reflect on tragedy and hope, then learns danzón at Salón Los Ángeles with Miguel Nieto. With friends, they share chamorro de cerdo and toast resilience with creative micheladas.

programme.title: Pati's Mexican Table
programme.desc: Pati tours Mexico City’s changing skyline on the Iztapalapa Cable Bus, builds a bamboo bike at Bamboocycles, and enjoys tacos and tlacoyos, exploring how design, transit, and creativity shape a sustainable, connected city.

programme.title: Pati's Mexican Table
programme.desc: Pati visits Xochimilco’s canals to see ancient chinampas, enjoys pipián verde with Chef Raúl, learns about axolotl conservation, and shares chile relleno with locals, celebrating resilience and tradition.

programme.title: Pati's Mexican Table
programme.desc: Pati traces Mexico City’s past with Erika Zúñiga, from Templo Mayor to Bellas Artes and a churro stop at El Moro. With Enrique Acevedo at Central de Abastos, they enjoy tacos de lengua and explore the city’s vibrant present and future.

programme.title: Pati's Mexican Table
programme.desc: Pati visits El Volador with Francisco Enríquez to see art for Day of the Dead parades. She connects with papel picado artist Yuriria Alfaro and honors tradition with fish tamales, celebrating imagination and heritage in Mexico City.

programme.title: Pati's Mexican Table
programme.desc: Pati explores Mercado de Jamaica’s colorful stalls with photographer Nuria Lagarde, then visits author Laura Esquivel to share stories, pan dulce, and chocolate, reflecting on how art and identity shape Mexico City’s creative spirit.

programme.title: Billy & Dom Eat The World
programme.desc: Billy and Dom learn the secrets behind the perfect traditional English roast dinner in London’s historic Borough Market, explore the best of the diverse food offerings in Brick Lane and pop in to see their friend, Sir Ian McKellen, in his pub in East London.

programme.title: Today's Homeowner with Danny Lipford
programme.desc: Find out how to turn your house into a high-tech home without spending a fortune. From wireless cameras and speakers to home security and lighting, we’ve got some practical electronic ideas for your home that won’t break the bank!

programme.title: Today's Homeowner with Danny Lipford
programme.desc: If the kitchen is the heart of the home, then a kitchen renovation is like open heart surgery. We’re taking a look at three very different kitchen remodels, from classic to contemporary, all of which result in a more functional and attractive kitchen.

programme.title: Today's Homeowner with Danny Lipford
programme.desc: The type and style of flooring in your house has a big impact on the look and feel of your home. We’re exploring some innovative, DIY friendly flooring options that make installing a new floor in your home a whole lot easier.

programme.title: Today's Homeowner with Danny Lipford
programme.desc: These five home improvement projects can really update the look of your home without breaking your budget. Some are do-it-yourself projects, while others are best tackled by a professional.

programme.title: Today's Homeowner with Danny Lipford
programme.desc: Often the most effective enhancements for a home’s interior are the easiest to accomplish. With a few pieces of molding and a little elbow grease we’re making some great improvements for some happy homeowners.

programme.title: Today's Homeowner with Danny Lipford
programme.desc: Buying a house is always a chore; but when it’s your first time, it’s both a challenge and an adventure. And when the house is a fixer-upper, that adventure becomes a way of life. Find out about buying a house in the first of our six-part series.

programme.title: Today's Homeowner with Danny Lipford
programme.desc: In the second of our six-part series, the paperwork is done, but the fun has just begun as our First Time Homeowner tackles much needed renovations before she can move into her new home. Whether it’s repairs or improvements, there’s a lot to learn!

programme.title: Life on Mar's: The Home Makeover Show
programme.desc: Season 2 premiere. Mar Jennings, known as America's Top Lifestyle Expert, is ready to renovate all the homes on his Westport, CT street. First up is a huge addition for neighbors Andrea and Bob's 1930's saltbox. Find out if Mar's new design team is up for the challenge. Part 1 of 2.

programme.title: Life on Mar's: The Home Makeover Show
programme.desc: Season premiere part 2. Mar began a huge addition on the Nook, a 1930's saltbox, for his neighbors Bob and Andrea. But at the beginning of the dining and den walkthrough the homeowners were unreadable. Tune in to see if they will approve of Mar's progress and designs.

programme.title: Life on Mar's: The Home Makeover Show
programme.desc: Master bedrooms and baths are things that dreams are made of until some nightmare hiccups happen. Turns out that visiting Broadway show sets provides unexpected inspiration. Amid creating the serene décor, Mar also finds a practical way to hide a litter box, and his team takes bets on which design his fans vote for.

programme.title: Life on Mar's: The Home Makeover Show
programme.desc: In this outdoor transformation episode, Mar is thrilled to reveal the final touches on the Nook, a 1930's saltbox, for his neighbors Bob and Andrea. Complete landscaping, outdoor dining and patio, garage, driveway, gas lantern and so much more.

programme.title: Life on Mar's: The Home Makeover Show
programme.desc: The holidays are in full swing on Mar's. Join America's Top Lifestyle Expert Mar Jennings and his home makeover team as they enjoy Westport CT during the holidays with activities like caroling, sleigh rides, shopping and more.

programme.title: Life on Mar's: The Home Makeover Show
programme.desc: The transformation of a Westport CT mid-century bungalow picks up steam and the change is amazing. America's Top Lifestyle Expert Mar Jennings and his team love seeing their plans come to life. And when it's a hands-on project, Mar can't resist being inspired by his favorite '70's bionic TV heroes.

programme.title: Life on Mar's: The Home Makeover Show
programme.desc: The Bungalow transformation is complete and ready to reveal. It's down to the wire on finishing this home in time for an open house. Yvonne and Mar have overseen all the construction and renovation, but now there's a rush to finish the staging.

programme.title: Life on Mar's: The Home Makeover Show
programme.desc: The transformation of a Westport CT street comes to a halt when Mar's own home suffers some unexpected damage. But that means an all-new kitchen. Team Mar may not be able to cope with this one, especially when the project seems to keep on growing.

programme.title: Life on Mar's: The Home Makeover Show
programme.desc: After a water leak forced Mar to make an emergency renovation to his own kitchen, work began with a design palette all inspired by a fish. Now Mar is ready to finish it up, but takes a break to throw out the first pitch at a game. Hopefully his aim will be true.

programme.title: Bare Feet with Mickela Mallozzi
programme.desc: Mickela gets a taste of The Balkans as she explores three of New York City's five boroughs: the Slavic Soul Party in Brooklyn, the Gypsy Festival in Manhattan, and the Little Serbia celebration in Queens.

programme.title: Bare Feet with Mickela Mallozzi
programme.desc: The Republic of Georgia in The Caucasus is a land of wine, unrivaled hospitality, and Polyphonic singing. In the capital city of Tbilisi, Mickela dances with the Sukhishvili Georgian National Ballet, as well as the folkloric group Zedashe.

programme.title: Bare Feet with Mickela Mallozzi
programme.desc: From Israeli folk dance at the 92Y to eating knishes in the Lower East Side, Mickela spends some quality time getting to know one of New York's most cultural and religiously pious populations.

programme.title: My Greek Table with Diane Kochilas
programme.desc: Nemea and Argos have their own character and cuisine, and both are home to some of Greece's most famous wines and tempting dishes. Whether in the town square with a village cook, or with Diane in her kitchen, amazing local dishes await.

programme.title: My Greek Table with Diane Kochilas
programme.desc: On a cruise to Mykonos, Diane discovers the quiet culture of its local farmers, not the dazzling side of Greece’s party island. Join her as she cooks with a young chef who is breathing new life into the island's traditional recipes.

programme.title: My Greek Table with Diane Kochilas
programme.desc: One of the most charming aspects of Greece is the Athenian Riviera, with its gorgeous cafes, bustling nightlife, traditional fish markets, splendid yachting, and more. In her kitchen, Diane cooks three dishes inspired by Athens' Riviera.

programme.title: My Greek Table with Diane Kochilas
programme.desc: Renowned for its history of marble sculpting, and home to remarkable flavors, Tinos is magical. Follow Diane as she visits a famous local marble sculptor, learns a few secrets from an old friend, and creates traditional Tinos specialties.

programme.title: My Greek Table with Diane Kochilas
programme.desc: Diane meets with friend Dean Karnazes who helps her hone her running technique and shares some health tips. Together they make a simple Greek salad with local ingredients, while Diane prepares a healthy Messinian meal back in her kitchen.

programme.title: Me, Myself, and the World
programme.desc: Pamela continues her visit to the exciting city of Ho Chi Minh City (Saigon), Vietnam inspiring others to join her Solo Travel Revolution. She explores the Cu Chi Tunnels and offers travel tips on her segment "Packing with Pamela."

programme.title: Me, Myself, and the World
programme.desc: Pamela visits the beautiful island of Bali, Indonesia, inspiring others to join her Solo Travel Revolution. She takes a Batik Class, visits local eateries in Ubud, and offers travel tips in her segment "Packing with Pamela."

programme.title: Bare Feet with Mickela Mallozzi
programme.desc: Cyprus is an ancient island full of mythology and festive dancing. Mickela discovers the rich tapestry of Greek culture here by taking part in belly dancing, meeting silversmiths and lace artisans, and celebrating the Kataklysmos Festival.

programme.title: Bare Feet with Mickela Mallozzi
programme.desc: The Asian American and Pacific Islander (AAPI) community is a beautifully diverse group of cultures, and Mickela gets a taste of the Pacific Islands around the boroughs by experiencing Na Pua Mai Ka Lani Nuioka, Soh Daiko, Taiko, and more.

programme.title: Bare Feet with Mickela Mallozzi
programme.desc: Mickela gets up close and personal with the locals as she heads to Buenos Aires, Argentina to learn the seductive dance of tango. From attending the world's largest tango festival to dancing on the city's main stage, Mickela sees it all.

programme.title: Abilene Town
programme.desc: In Abilene, Kan., Marshal Dan Mitchell (Randolph Scott) contends with unruly cattlemen and a group of determined homesteaders intending to settle on government land bordering the town. Hoping to rid the town of the farmers, the cowboys set fire to their camp, and a desperado murders a homesteader, but Dan refuses to allow them revenge. Joining a posse under a crooked sheriff, and with the help of singer Rita (Ann Dvorak) and a merchant, Dan forces a peaceful showdown between the factions.

programme.title: The Hanged Man
programme.desc: A former gunslinger survives his own hanging and transforms himself into a mysterious avenger of injustice.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Mark tries to play Cupid for his father and a pretty young stranger who arrives in town.

programme.title: The Sundowners
programme.desc: Texans Tom (Robert Sterling) and Jeff Cloud (John Barrymore Jr.) find a corpse on their ranch. Earl Boyce (Jack Elam) saw who killed the man, but he's too frightened to tell. Outlaw Kid Wichita (Robert Preston), another Cloud brother, comes to town to offer his services. After catching some local ranchers messing around with Tom's cattle, he steals the men's saddles. From there, things deteriorate into kidnapping, gang wars and murder, and the line between hero and villain becomes blurred.

programme.title: F Troop
programme.desc: A pair of American Indian renegades kidnap Parmenter, but just want some company.

programme.title: F Troop

programme.title: County Line
programme.desc: When his best friend is brutally gunned down, a former sheriff is left with many questions and no answers. After the investigation stalls and his replacement turns a blind eye, he takes the case into his own hands.

programme.title: The Bushwhackers
programme.desc: After four years of bloodshed, the Civil War finally ends. Discarding his weapons, Southern soldier Jefferson Waring (John Ireland) dedicates himself to the cause of pacifism. Waring relocates to a quiet frontier town in Missouri, where he hears news of profiteer Artemus Taylor (Lon Chaney) and a campaign of intimidation against local property holders. When several of his neighbors are killed by Taylor's gang, the newly nonviolent Waring struggles to determine the right thing to do.

programme.title: Gunsmoke in Tucson
programme.desc: An outlaw leader (Mark Stevens) and his lawman brother (Forrest Tucker) straddle a feud between farmers and cattlemen.

programme.title: Border River
programme.desc: A Confederate officer and his men journey to Mexico to buy guns to continue the war efforts; a Union officer is determined to stop them.

programme.title: Colorado Territory
programme.desc: Outlaw Wes McQueen (Joel McCrea) escapes from jail and travels to a meeting with his old partner-in-crime Dave Rickard (Basil Ruysdael). En route, McQueen dispatches a gang of bandits who try to rob the stagecoach and, in the process, wins the attentions of a young woman (Dorothy Malone) with whom he'd like to settle down. Convinced by Rickard to do one last heist, he finds out that his fellow henchmen are not to be trusted and the woman he truly loves is an ex-saloon girl (Virginia Mayo).

programme.title: Ride the High Country
programme.desc: Reduced to transporting gold from a distant mine to a small-town bank, retired lawman Steve Judd (Joel McCrea) recruits friend Gil Westrum (Randolph Scott), who has been performing in a traveling carnival. Unknown to Steve, the restless Gil and a young drifter intend to steal the next gold transport. On the way, the men help Elsa Knudsen (Mariette Hartley) to break free from her zealot father and join her fiancé at the mine, not realizing the consequences that await them all.
